scripts.build: bun run --cwd website build && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-termcast build && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-mcp build
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run validate:skills
scripts.validate:full: bun run validate && bun run build && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/hig-doctor test && node --test test/workflow-security.test.mjs test/audit-patterns-sync.test.mjs
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd website typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-termcast typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/hig-doctor/src-mcp typecheck
